title: phaius callosus
intro: Phaius callosus, also known as the golden orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Phaius callosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve extracting its roots and leaves to create infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
